{"id":"smallhold-duw","title":"Account lookup endpoints: by ID and by acct handle","description":"GET /api/v1/accounts/:id returns account by snowflake ID (works for local accounts from accounts table and remote accounts from remote_accounts table). GET /api/v1/accounts/lookup?acct=username or ?acct=username@domain resolves the handle and returns the account.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to test these endpoints against mastodon.social and document exact response shapes.

Test discipline: local account by ID returns correct Account object; remote account by ID returns Account object from remote_accounts row; unknown ID returns 404; lookup local handle returns local account; lookup remote handle triggers resolution if not cached; lookup non-existent handle returns 404. Use real in-memory SQLite not mocks. mastodon.social responses are the oracle for response shape.

Defensive programming: ID parameter validated as valid i64 before DB query, return 404 not 422 for non-numeric IDs (Mastodon behavior); lookup acct resolves remote if not cached with a timeout to not hang the request; no .unwrap() outside tests; all errors Result<T, AppError>.","acceptance_criteria":"Local and remote accounts returned by ID; lookup works for local and remote handles; non-existent returns 404; non-numeric ID returns 404 not 422; remote resolution has timeout","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:32:28Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:32:28Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2io","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:32:30Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
